title: Lead Instructional Designer at Chandigarh University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Chandigarh University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
